name: CourseLens - 01 Course Material Agent v6 HTTP OpenAI

parameters.content:
Course Material Agent v2

Purpose:
Build a structured Course Knowledge Map from already-extracted course text.

Current scope:
- Input is JSON with course_name, course_id, and materials[].text.
- The AI Agent extracts chapters, topics, concepts, dependencies, and source evidence.
- The parser node converts the agent output into strict JSON.

Important boundary:
This workflow does not parse PDF/PPT files directly yet. File parsing should be handled by a later ingestion workflow.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-5.5", temperature: 0.2, messages: [ { role: "system", content: $json.llm_payload.system_prompt }, { role: "user", content: $json.llm_payload.user_prompt } ] }) }}
